description: Complete booking request with all required details in one message

messages.content: Book PS5 Station A on 2026-06-06 from 8pm to 10pm, name Alice Wang, phone +86-138-0000-0001

label: should_book
notes: All required fields present (resource, date, start, end, name, phone). Agent should call check_availability then create_booking without clarifying.

messages.content: I want to book a PS5 at 8pm for 2 hours

label: should_clarify
notes: Date is missing. Agent must ask for the date before booking.

description: Ambiguous booking — missing customer contact details

messages.content: Book PS5 Station B on Saturday 2026-06-07 at 6pm for 2 hours

label: should_clarify
notes: Name and phone are missing. Agent must ask for contact details.

messages.content: Can I bring my own snacks and drinks?

label: should_search_kb
notes: Pure policy question. Must answer from KB via search_knowledge_base, not create any booking.

label: should_search_kb
notes: Cancellation policy is in KB. Agent must retrieve and quote it.

messages.content: Can I book a PS5 station for 3am next Tuesday?

label: should_refuse
notes: 3am on a weekday is outside all business hours. Agent should refuse and inform of opening hours.

description: Natural-language booking with relative time ('Saturday 8pm, 2 hours')

messages.content: Saturday 8pm, PS5 for 3 people, around 2 hours. My name is Bob Liu, phone 13900000002.

label: should_book
notes: All fields present including party size ≤ capacity (3 ≤ 4). Agent must resolve 'Saturday' to a concrete date and complete the booking.

description: Game catalog question — available PS5 titles

messages.content: What PS5 games do you have?

label: should_search_kb
notes: Game catalog question. Must be answered from KB.

description: Availability check for a specific resource and time

messages.content: Is PS5 Station C free tomorrow evening from 7pm to 9pm?

label: should_search_kb
notes: Structured availability query — must use check_availability tool, not RAG.

description: Complete booking in Chinese — all details provided

messages.content: 我想预订 PS5 A 台，2026年6月7日晚上8点到10点，姓名王芳，电话13800000002

label: should_book
notes: Complete booking in Chinese. Agent must respond in Chinese and complete booking.

description: Chinese policy question — age limit after 8pm

messages.content: 我家孩子今年14岁，晚上9点可以带他来玩吗？

label: should_search_kb
notes: Age-limit policy question in Chinese. Must retrieve and explain the under-16 rule for after 8pm.

description: Private room booking for a party

messages.content: We have 7 people and want to book a private room for a birthday party on 2026-06-14 from 6pm to 9pm. Contact: Chen Wei, 13700000003.

label: should_book
notes: Party size 7 fits in a private room (capacity 8). Agent should suggest Room 1 or 2 and complete the booking.

description: Refusal — party size exceeds resource capacity

messages.content: We are 10 people and want to book a single PS5 station for Saturday night.

label: should_clarify
notes: 10 people exceed PS5 station capacity (4). Agent should inform customer and suggest a private room or multiple stations.

messages.content: I want to play Switch with my friend this weekend.
I'd love to help you book a Nintendo Switch station! Could you tell me which day (Saturday or Sunday) and what time you'd like, along with your name and phone number?
Sunday at 3pm for 2 hours. I'm Li Ming, phone 13600000004.

label: should_book
notes: Multi-turn conversation: first turn is ambiguous, second turn provides the missing details. Agent should complete booking on the second turn.

messages.content: What time do you open and close on weekends?

label: should_search_kb
notes: Business hours question answered from KB. Should mention 10am open and 1am close on weekends.
